notes: Grok h2_mode=1 + token-only template re-test: BLOCKED but NO visible warning. Token-only NDJSON template (removed conversation object) did NOT prevent URL redirect — APF still redirected to synthetic conversation URL /c/00000000-apf0-warn-0000-000000000001 with rid param. Grok backend returns 400 for the fake UUID, causing repeated polling failures. Same '오류가 발생했습니다' error page as #283 (h2_mode=2). The URL redirect is embedded in the APF response template structure itself, not just the conversation object. Need to investigate how Grok's frontend processes the NDJSON token stream and extracts conversation/redirect URLs.
